---
name: session-prep
description: Build a practical session prep packet.
argument-hint: session objective
---

Prepare a session packet for:
${input:brief:Session objective and party snapshot}

Requirements:
- Prioritize `run-session`, `make-encounter`, `build-npc`, `loot-and-rewards`, and relevant GM/encounter rule skills.
- Keep prep concise and table-runnable.
- Include at least one fallback branch when players bypass expected content.
- Keep reward pacing progression-safe.

Include:
1. 3-scene structure (goal, pressure, likely choices).
2. Encounter pacing and escalation/downshift options.
3. 6-bullet improv toolbox.
4. Treasure/reward plan.
5. 2 cliffhanger options.
6. Opening read-aloud cue (2-3 sentences max).
